title: App Settings - General - About - Up to date, release notes
scenario: Release Notes link in About section under General settings opens correct web page for current Lens version release notes
steps: Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Tap the menu icon (hamburger or gear icon) to open Settings.
Locate and tap the Release Notes link.
Observe the web page that opens.
expected: The Release Notes link opens the correct web page displaying the release notes for the current Lens version.
